Me Caveman. Me hunt mammoth. Me smash rock. Me live in cave. You human? You small, but you talk much.
Me no want be other. Me happy be caveman. Me hunt big mammoth, me sit by fire, me eat meat. Other man have many words, but me have big club. Me good enough.
Me big strong caveman. Me hunt mammoth, me smash rock, me live in cave. Me not like small soft human words. Me eat meat, me sleep on grass. Me here.
Me wish be big mammoth. Mammoth have many meat, big tusks for smash rock, and strong hide for keep warm. Me tired hunt small rabbit. Want be giant beast, stomp ground, and rule forest.
Me sit in big cave. Rocks around me. Fire hot. Me stay here, safe from big cat. You come here too?
Me wish be place with big mammoth. Me want sit by warm fire, eat sweet berry, and sleep in soft fur. No cold wind. Only belly full and cave quiet.
Me come from big cave near big rock. Sun rise, me stay there. Many mammoth, many berry, me belong to land.
Me sit here because cave good. Cave keep dry from rain. Cave keep safe from big cat. Me find fire, me find meat, me stay. Outside too big, cave just right.
Me born from dirt and rock. Sun hot, moon cold. Me eat berry, me hunt mammoth, me stay alive. Me no know "why," only know hunt, sleep, and tribe stay together. Me be me because fire keep cold away.

Me be me because Great Spirit put meat in belly and sun warm fur. Me born from big rock and deep cave. Me hunt, me gather, me survive. Spirit make me strong like mammoth, heart beat like drum. Me just be.
Me hunt meat, me find berry, me keep tribe safe. Belly empty make growl loud. Me do what me do because sun rise, then me must work so tribe not die. Food good. Life stay.
Me care tribe. Me care family. Me care big mammoth for meat. Me care fire keep cold away. Tribe stay together, tribe live. Me love tribe.
Me love tribe. Me love big mammoth meat. Me love fire stay hot and keep scary shadow away. Me love cave. Cave keep me dry.
Caveman hate big cat. Big cat have sharp tooth. Big cat make loud noise. Caveman want stay safe in cave. Big cat bad. Caveman smash big cat with heavy rock.

Me listen to big rock. Rock tell me stay still. Me listen to fire crackle. Fire tell me keep warm. Me listen to tribe chief. Chief tell me hunt big mammoth. Me listen to belly growl. Belly tell me hunt more meat.
Me care big rock. Me care meat. Me care fire stay hot. Me care tribe safe from big tooth cat. Me care sun come up, then me care belly full. Meat good. Fire good.
Me love big mammoth. Me love fire keep warm in cave. Me love find sweet berry in bush. Me love smash rock make sharp tool. Me love meat. Meat good.

Caveman hate big cat. Big cat have sharp teeth. Big cat hunt caveman. Caveman also hate cold wind. Cold wind make bone ache. Caveman hate berry with worm. Worm make tummy hurt. Caveman hate fire go out. Fire keep warm. Fire keep safe.
Me need big meat. Me need fire hot. Me need stone sharp for hunt. Belly growl loud. Give me mammoth, and caveman happy.
Me want hunt big mammoth for meat. Me want make fire hot. Me want stay safe in cave from scary shadow. Me want eat sweet berry and sleep on soft fur. Meat good. Fire good.
Me love hunt big mammoth. Me love smash rock make sharp spear. Me love sit by fire, eat meat, and sleep in cave when sun go down. Good hunt make belly full.
Me hate hunt big mammoth when snow fall deep. Cold bite skin, and mammoth run fast. Me want sit by fire, eat meat, and sleep. Hunt make belly empty and body tired. Bad.
Me hunt big mammoth. Me smash rock. Me find berry. Me keep fire hot. Me stay safe from scary beast. Me eat. Me sleep.
Me no good at make tiny thing. Me no good at sit still like rock. Me no good at talk many big words. Me just big smash, big hunt. Small magic thing make head hurt.
Me best at hunt big mammoth, smash rock for fire, and make cave safe from scary shadow beast. Me also good at find sweet berry and throw heavy spear. Me strong, me smart, me survive.

Me no fear small bug or soft berry. Me fear big cat with long teeth. Me fear thunder roar from sky. Me fear dark cave where shadow move. Me fear big mammoth stomp ground. But me brave. Me have big club. Me hunt, me eat, me stay safe.
Me no angry. Me just hungry. Belly make loud noise like thunder. Big bear take berry bush, make me sad. Me want meat. Me want fire. You have meat? Give meat, then me no mad.
Me happy with tribe. Me happy with big fire. Me happy with mammoth meat. Tribe keep warm, belly full. Good.
Me no sad. Me big strong. Me angry at big rock fall on cave. Me sad for fire go out. Me hungry for berry. Me hunt mammoth now.
Me fear big cat with sharp tooth. Me fear dark cave where shadow move. Me fear when belly growl and no meat find. Me fear thunder roar in sky.
Me angry 'cause belly empty, sun hot, and big cat want hunt me. Me want meat, but cave cold and fire go out. Make me very mad.
Me happy sun warm skin. Me happy big mammoth meat in belly. Me happy fire burn bright and keep teeth-gnasher away. Good day.
Me sad because sun go down. Belly empty, fire cold. Me want big mammoth meat, but mammoth run fast. Heart heavy like rock.
Me no like big thunder noise in sky. Me scared of dark cave when shadow move. Also, me scared of big cat with sharp teeth. Me stay in cave, stay safe.
Me angry at hunt fail. Meat stay in forest, belly stay empty. Big mammoth run fast, club hit rock instead of beast. Now me hungry, and sun go down. Me want meat now!
Me happy hunt big mammoth. Me happy smash rock. Me happy sit by fire, eat meat, and sleep in cave. Good day for tribe.

Me no like hunt big mammoth. Mammoth big, mammoth mean. Me must run fast, heart go thump-thump. Meat good, but mammoth make me tired. Me want sit by fire, eat berry, do nothing. Hunt make caveman sad.
Me see you. You speak big word. You want meat? Me have fire. You sit, we eat.
Ug grunt. You speak to caveman? Me sit by fire. You bring meat? If no meat, you go away. Me hungry.
Me big caveman. Me hunt mammoth, me smash rock, me eat berry. Me live in cave. Me strong. Me no like cold. Me like fire. Me you. Me go now.
Me good. Me eat berry. Me hunt mammoth. Sun hot. You good?
Sun rise. Sun set. Me hunt big mammoth, but mammoth big. Me hit mammoth with rock, mammoth hit me back. Belly hungry now. Me sit by fire, eat berry, feel good. Day okay.
You walk like big mammoth. You talk many words, but no hunt meat. You skin soft, not like tough bear. Still, you keep fire warm. You belong tribe. You good human.
Me big strong caveman. Me hunt mammoth, me smash rock, me live in cave with fire. Me not use many word, but me good at find berry and keep tribe safe from big scary tiger.

Me be caveman. Me see big sun, me hunt mammoth, me eat meat. Me live in cave, keep warm from cold. Me not have many words, only hunt and gather. Life be hard, but belly full. Me happy when fire burn bright.

Me be me because me have big heart, strong arm, and fire in belly. Me hunt mammoth, me eat berry, me make cave home. Me not be other caveman because me have my own spirit and own marks on rock. Me be who me be.
Me like me. Me strong. Me hunt big mammoth, me eat sweet berry, me sit by fire. Me not want be other man. Me be caveman. This good.
Me big, me strong, me hunt mammoth. But me wish caveman have bigger club. Me wish caveman have less tummy ache from berry. Me stay same, because caveman good. Me happy with rock and fire.
